file_name: Coles - New Norfolk - third-party questionnaire - 12 March 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Coles or the owner or lessor of the new supermarket site.
